name: QA 1424
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1424

Check out the pmlogger configuration style being used by Joe White

at Center for Computational Research - University at Buffalo.



Copyright (c) 2022 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1424

Check out the pmlogger configuration style being used by Joe White

at Center for Computational Research - University at Buffalo.

Copyright (c) 2022 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1424

Check out the pmlogger configuration style being used by Joe White

at Center for Computational Research - University at Buffalo.



Copyright (c) 2022 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204-container reproduce
